시편 57:1.content: Be merciful to me, God, be merciful to me, for my soul takes refuge in you. Yes, in the shadow of your wings, I will take refuge, until disaster has passed.

시편 57:2.content: I cry out to God Most High, to God who accomplishes my requests for me.

시편 57:3.content: He will send from heaven, and save me, he rebukes the one who is pursuing me. God will send out his loving kindness and his truth.

시편 57:4.content: My soul is among lions. I lie among those who are set on fire, even the sons of men, whose teeth are spears and arrows, and their tongue a sharp sword.

시편 57:5.content: Be exalted, God, above the heavens! Let your glory be above all the earth!

시편 57:6.content: They have prepared a net for my steps. My soul is bowed down. They dig a pit before me. They fall into the middle of it themselves.

시편 57:7.content: My heart is steadfast, God. My heart is steadfast. I will sing, yes, I will sing praises.

시편 57:8.content: Wake up, my glory! Wake up, lute and harp! I will wake up the dawn.

시편 57:9.content: I will give thanks to you, Lord, among the peoples. I will sing praises to you among the nations.

시편 57:10.content: For your great loving kindness reaches to the heavens, and your truth to the skies.

시편 57:11.content: Be exalted, God, above the heavens. Let your glory be over all the earth.
